description_long: This is a large, hardcover book with a brown cover and a visible, textured spine. The front cover features a circular portrait illustration of a bearded man in traditional attire, centered prominently. The book appears thick, with tightly bound cream-colored pages visible along the sides. There is a white rectangular label affixed to the upper left corner of the cover, possibly for cataloging or library use. The cover has gold or yellowish text in a serif font, and the overall design is formal and scholarly. The book's substantial size and weight suggest it is a reference or academic volume.
description: A large, brown hardcover book with a circular portrait illustration and gold text on the cover, featuring a thick spine and cream-colored pages.
description_view_0: The book is seen from a slightly elevated front-left angle, showing the cover illustration, gold text, and a white label in the upper left corner.
description_view_1: The book is viewed from the right side, displaying the full cover illustration and text, with the thickness of the pages clearly visible.
description_view_2: The book is seen from the back-right, with the cover illustration upside down and the white label on the far right edge.
description_view_3: The book is viewed from the left side, highlighting the textured spine and the white label on the spine's upper edge.
attribute_cover_illustration: The cover features a circular, sepia-toned portrait of a bearded man in traditional attire, rendered in a realistic style. The illustration is centered and framed by the brown background, giving the book a scholarly and historical appearance.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is brown with a textured appearance, featuring a white label near the top edge. No visible decorative elements or vertical text are present.
